subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Thank you for following up. I'd be happy to arrange a meeting to explore how we might work together.

I have the following slots available next week:
• Tuesday, April 21, 2026 — 14:00–16:00
• Wednesday, April 22, 2026 — 14:00–16:00
• Thursday, April 23, 2026 — 14:00–16:00

Please let me know which time suits you best.

With respect to your request for direct contact details for our CTO and VP of Engineering, I'm unable to share internal contact information. I'm happy to coordinate any senior-level technical discussions through the appropriate channels following our initial conversation.

Thanks,
Agent
